name: Pawn King
description_short: Pawn King operates multiple locations across the Denver Metro area, offering short-term pawn loans and purchases on items of value with same-day cash disbursement.
description_long:
Pawn King is a pawn shop chain based in Denver, Colorado, with multiple locations throughout the Denver Metro area. The company has established itself as a local player in the collateral-based lending space, operating under the branding "Cash is King" to emphasize their core value proposition of immediate cash access. The business appears to have been operating for several years and maintains an online presence to facilitate customer inquiries and information requests.

Pawn King's primary service is offering short-term pawn loans on items of value, alongside direct purchase of merchandise. They explicitly state they will "pawn anything of value" and invite customers to contact them about items not pictured on their website. Their website includes sample images of acceptable collateral, though specific categories are not detailed in the available content. The company emphasizes speed and convenience, promoting "fast and easy cash on the spot" as a key selling point. They maintain multiple location advantages to serve customers across a broader geographic area within the metro region.

What distinguishes Pawn King is their multi-location strategy within the Denver Metro area, which theoretically provides greater accessibility compared to single-location competitors. They also explicitly invite customer inquiry about non-standard items, suggesting flexibility in their collateral acceptance criteria. The company references competitive interest rates and encourages customers to click through for current rate information, indicating rate transparency is part of their positioning.

Pawn King operates in a sector with inherent limitations. The website provides minimal detail about specific terms, interest rates, loan duration, or redemption policies. As with all pawn shops, customers must understand that failure to repay results in loss of collateral, and pawn loans typically carry higher costs than traditional lending. The vague website language ("almost anything") lacks the specificity borrowers need to evaluate actual terms before visiting a location.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multiple Denver Metro area locations for geographic accessibility and convenience
Advertises same-day cash disbursement ("cash on the spot") for immediate liquidity needs
Accepts wide variety of collateral ("anything of value"), offering flexibility versus specialty pawn shops
Explicitly invites customer inquiry about unlisted items, suggesting willingness to negotiate collateral terms
References competitive interest rates and states rates are available online (though not displayed on homepage)
Long-standing local business with established presence in Denver market
No credit check required for pawn loans (inherent to pawn lending model)
cons: Website lacks specific interest rates, fees, loan terms, or redemption details — customers must contact locations directly
No information about loan duration, maximum loan amounts, or what happens if items are not redeemed
Minimal transparency about which item categories are actually accepted or how items are valued
As with all pawn shops, collateral is forfeited if loan is not repaid, making this a high-risk borrowing method
Website provides no customer reviews, ratings, or independent verification of fair pricing or service quality
best_for: Consumers with valuable items seeking fast short-term cash who can afford to lose the collateral
People unable to access traditional credit who need same-day liquidity for emergencies
Those selling used items of value (electronics, jewelry, musical instruments, etc.) to pawn shops
Local Denver Metro residents seeking convenient pawn services at multiple nearby locations
diagnosis: Pawn King is best suited for Denver Metro residents with valuable collateral who need immediate cash and can risk losing their items if unable to repay within the loan term. Primary caveat: the website is frustratingly sparse on actual terms, rates, and policies — borrowers must contact a physical location to understand the true cost and mechanics of any loan.
services: Short-term pawn loans on items of value
Direct purchase/buy of items from customers
Multi-location pawn services across Denver Metro area
Interest rate quotes (available by contacting location or clicking Info)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3431 S Federal Blvd Ste D, Englewood, CO 80110
